code:
--- config: logLevel: 'debug' theme: 'forest' --- %% Ref.: https://mermaid.js.org/syntax/timeline.html timeline title Advent of Code 2025 - Puzzle Days (in December) 1
Secret Entrance: Modular arithmetic 2
Gift Shop: Repeating number / string sub-sequences 3
Lobby: Max digits in number 4
Printing Departments: 2D grid symbol matching & neighbour counting 5
Cafeteria: Positive integer number ranges / intervals 6
Trash Compactor: Column based parsing of data input 7
Laboratories: Paths through 2D grid 8
Playground: Ordering (by Euclidian distance) & grouping 3D point pairs. 9
Movie Theater: 2D points, rectangles sizes & ray-casting 10
Factory: Minimal solutions to sets of linear equations 11
Reactor: Graph paths + caching 12
Christmas Tree Farm: Shape fitting in 2D grids %% Version 2025-12-17a

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我想做一个时间轴，展示Advent of Code 2025的谜题日程。主题用forest绿色系，标题就叫"Advent of Code 2025 - Puzzle Days (in December)"。每天对应一个地点，从Secret Entrance开始。
elements_involved: Advent of Code 2025 - Puzzle Days (in December)

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 明白，forest主题。第一天的地点是Secret Entrance，谜题类型是Modular arithmetic对吧？那第二天呢？我需要确认每个地点的命名格式，是用<br前缀还是直接写地点名？
对，用<br前缀，比如brSecret Entrance。第二天是Gift Shop，谜题跟Repeating number / string sub-sequences有关。第三天Lobby是Max digits in number。你先把这三条加上，我继续说后面的。
好的，前三条已添加。继续吧，我同步记录。

第四天Printing Departments是2D grid symbol matching & neighbour counting，第五天Cafeteria处理Positive integer number ranges，第六天Trash Compactor是Column based parsing。第七天Laboratories是Paths through 2D grid，第八天Playground比较特别，是Ordering by Euclidian distance还要grouping 3D point pairs。
已添加day 4到day 8。接下来是第九天以后吗？

对，第九天Movie Theater是2D points, rectangles sizes & ray-casting，第十天Factory是Minimal solutions to sets of linear equations，第十一天Reactor是Graph paths + caching，第十二天Christmas Tree Farm是Shape fitting in 2D grids。最后加个版本号2025-12-17a。
elements_involved: Minimal solutions to sets of linear equations

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 全部12天已添加，版本号也加上了。我检查一下：Secret、Gift、Lobby、Printing、Cafeteria、Trash、Laboratories、Playground、Movie、Factory、Reactor、Tree Farm，主题forest，标题和版本号都正确。还有需要调整的吗？
没问题，就是这样。Playground那里的Euclidian distance拼写确认一下，还有ray-casting的连字符。其他都很好。
确认无误，Euclidian和ray-casting都按你给的写法。时间轴完成了，共12天，forest主题，版本2025-12-17a。
